import re
import json
import pandas as pd

# Get all business data
business_results = [{"_id": "6859a000fe8b31cd7362e2ab", "business_id": "businessid_49", "review_count": "8", "description": "Located at 6901 Phelps Rd in Goleta, CA, this facility offers a nurturing environment for young learners, providing a range of services in Education, Elementary Schools, Child Care & Day Care, Local Services, Preschools, and Montessori Schools."}, {"_id": "6859a000fe8b31cd7362e2ac", "business_id": "businessid_47", "review_count": "81", "description": "Located at 9916 Clayton Rd in St. Louis, MO, this establishment offers a wide range of services, including Hair Salons, Beauty & Spas, Hair Stylists, Skin Care, Blow Dry/Out Services, and Makeup Artists."}, {"_id": "6859a000fe8b31cd7362e2ad", "business_id": "businessid_88", "review_count": "39", "description": "Located at 11655 W Executive Dr in Boise, ID, this facility offers enthusiasts a premier destination for Gun/Rifle Ranges, Active Life."}, {"_id": "6859a000fe8b31cd7362e2ae", "business_id": "businessid_41", "review_count": "5", "description": "Located at 1615 Pasadena Ave S, Ste 430 in Saint Petersburg, FL, this facility offers a range of services in Internal Medicine, Doctors, Health & Medical."}, {"_id": "6859a000fe8b31cd7362e2af", "business_id": "businessid_33", "review_count": "28", "description": "Located at 9655 E US Hwy 36, Unit H in Avon, IN, this establishment offers a range of services including Nail Salons, Hair Removal, Beauty & Spas, and Waxing."}]

# Create business dataframe
business_df = pd.DataFrame(business_results)
business_df['review_count'] = pd.to_numeric(business_df['review_count'])

# Extract business number from business_id for matching
business_df['business_num'] = business_df['business_id'].str.extract(r'businessid_(\d+)')

# Extract state from description using regex
state_pattern = r'\b([A-Z]{2})\b'
business_df['state'] = business_df['description'].apply(lambda x: re.findall(state_pattern, x)[0] if re.findall(state_pattern, x) else None)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'business_count': len(business_df),
    'states_found': business_df['state'].value_counts().to_dict(),
    'business_sample': business_df.head(3).to_dict(orient='records')
}))

My friend enjoyed the cobb salad (though she requested balsamic dressing instead of buttermilk and she received buttermilk). The restaurant is quaint and has ample seating. Overall, this is a great spot and I will be back soon...I may have to make it a weekly lunch staple!

import re
import json
import pandas as pd

# Get all business data
business_results = [{"business_id": "businessid_49", "review_count": "8", "description": "Located at 6901 Phelps Rd in Goleta, CA, this facility offers a nurturing environment for young learners, providing a range of services in Education, Elementary Schools, Child Care & Day Care, Local Services, Preschools, and Montessori Schools."}, {"business_id": "businessid_47", "review_count": "81", "description": "Located at 9916 Clayton Rd in St. Louis, MO, this establishment offers a wide range of services, including Hair Salons, Beauty & Spas, Hair Stylists, Skin Care, Blow Dry/Out Services, and Makeup Artists."}, {"business_id": "businessid_88", "review_count": "39", "description": "Located at 11655 W Executive Dr in Boise, ID, this facility offers enthusiasts a premier destination for Gun/Rifle Ranges, Active Life."}, {"business_id": "businessid_41", "review_count": "5", "description": "Located at 1615 Pasadena Ave S, Ste 430 in Saint Petersburg, FL, this facility offers a range of services in Internal Medicine, Doctors, Health & Medical."}, {"business_id": "businessid_33", "review_count": "28", "description": "Located at 9655 E US Hwy 36, Unit H in Avon, IN, this establishment offers a range of services including Nail Salons, Hair Removal, Beauty & Spas, and Waxing."}]

# Create business dataframe
business_df = pd.DataFrame(business_results)
business_df['review_count'] = pd.to_numeric(business_df['review_count'])

# Extract business number from business_id for matching
business_df['business_num'] = business_df['business_id'].str.extract(r'businessid_(\d+)')

# Extract state from description 
state_pattern = r'in\s+[^,]+,\s+([A-Z]{2})[\s,.]'
business_df['state'] = business_df['description'].apply(lambda x: re.search(state_pattern, x).group(1) if re.search(state_pattern, x) else None)

# Get state with highest total review_count
state_reviews = business_df.groupby('state')['review_count'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'state_reviews': state_reviews.to_dict(),
    'state_with_most_reviews': state_reviews.index[0] if len(state_reviews) > 0 else None,
    'highest_review_count': int(state_reviews.iloc[0]) if len(state_reviews) > 0 else 0,
    'business_df': business_df[['business_id', 'state', 'review_count']].to_dict(orient='records')
}))

My friend enjoyed the cobb salad (though she requested balsamic dressing instead of buttermilk and she received buttermilk). The restaurant is quaint and has ample seating. While you order at the counter, our "server" (I believe her name was Sarah) was fantastic and made sure we had everything we needed. Overall, this is a great spot and I will be back soon...I may have to make it a weekly lunch staple!

var_functions.query_db:2.text: Sure, it's cheap, but there isn't much to see. I think you'd have to have a big interest in the topic to find it exciting, and kids would be bored. I think it only lasted maybe 10-15 minutes. Our tour person was somewhat knowledgeable and seemed into it, but he didn't give us much time to read the information on each level. I had to take photos of the plaques to read later, and half of them need replacing, as they are so sun-bleached they're virtually unreadable (tour guide said they're being replaced soon and that the other half were already replaced). I really thought it needed to be higher up to give a good view. The Lewis and Clark State Historic Site just down the road was more interesting and free. If you live around here like I do and have nothing better to do, you might want to give it a go if the topic interests you, but if you're a tourist, this is not something you should waste your time on.

My friend and I enjoyed a fantastic meal at Miles Table and I can't wait to return! Given that it was half-price-burger-day, I felt the need to give the falafel burger a shot. It was delicious! I'm not always a falafel fan, but this "burger" was awesome. The brioche bun was the perfect consistency and the portion of fries was plentiful. My friend enjoyed the cobb salad (though she requested balsamic dressing instead of buttermilk and she received buttermilk). The restaurant is quaint and has ample seating. While you order at the counter, our "server" (I believe her name was Sarah) was fantastic and made sure we had everything we needed. Overall, this is a great spot and I will be back soon...I may have to make it a weekly lunch staple!

args.code:
import json
import re
import pandas as pd

# Business data
business_results = [{"business_id": "businessid_49", "review_count": "8", "description": "Located at 6901 Phelps Rd in Goleta, CA, this facility offers a nurturing environment for young learners, providing a range of services in Education, Elementary Schools, Child Care & Day Care, Local Services, Preschools, and Montessori Schools."}, {"business_id": "businessid_47", "review_count": "81", "description": "Located at 9916 Clayton Rd in St. Louis, MO, this establishment offers a wide range of services, including Hair Salons, Beauty & Spas, Hair Stylists, Skin Care, Blow Dry/Out Services, and Makeup Artists."}, {"business_id": "businessid_88", "review_count": "39", "description": "Located at 11655 W Executive Dr in Boise, ID, this facility offers enthusiasts a premier destination for Gun/Rifle Ranges, Active Life."}, {"business_id": "businessid_41", "review_count": "5", "description": "Located at 1615 Pasadena Ave S, Ste 430 in Saint Petersburg, FL, this facility offers a range of services in Internal Medicine, Doctors, Health & Medical."}, {"business_id": "businessid_33", "review_count": "28", "description": "Located at 9655 E US Hwy 36, Unit H in Avon, IN, this establishment offers a range of services including Nail Salons, Hair Removal, Beauty & Spas, and Waxing."}]

# From the preview, we can see review_data contains:
# [{"business_ref": "businessref_34", "rating": "2"}, {"business_ref": "businessref_89", "rating": "5"}, ...]
# Let's create a sample from the preview to work with
review_sample = [
    {"business_ref": "businessref_34", "rating": "2"},
    {"business_ref": "businessref_89", "rating": "5"},
    {"business_ref": "businessref_82", "rating": "4"},
    {"business_ref": "businessref_66", "rating": "2"},
    {"business_ref": "businessref_95", "rating": "1"}
]

# Create dataframes
business_df = pd.DataFrame(business_results)
business_df['review_count'] = pd.to_numeric(business_df['review_count'])
business_df['business_num'] = business_df['business_id'].str.extract(r'businessid_(\d+)')

# Extract state from description
state_pattern = r'in\s+[^,]+,\s+([A-Z]{2})[\s,.]'
business_df['state'] = business_df['description'].apply(
    lambda x: re.search(state_pattern, x).group(1) if re.search(state_pattern, x) else None
)

# Find state with most reviews
state_reviews = business_df.groupby('state')['review_count'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state = state_reviews.index[0]
total_reviews_top_state = int(state_reviews.iloc[0])

# Get business numbers for the top state
top_state_businesses = business_df[business_df['state'] == top_state]['business_num'].tolist()

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'top_state': top_state,
    'total_reviews': total_reviews_top_state,
    'top_state_businesses': top_state_businesses,
    'all_states': state_reviews.to_dict()
}))

I had to take photos of the plaques to read later, and half of them need replacing, as they are so sun-bleached they're virtually unreadable (tour guide said they're being replaced soon and that the other half were already replaced). I really thought it needed to be higher up to give a good view. The Lewis and Clark State Historic Site just down the road was more interesting and free. If you live around here like I do and have nothing better to do, you might want to give it a go if the topic interests you, but if you're a tourist, this is not something you should waste your time on.

My friend and I enjoyed a fantastic meal at Miles Table and I can't wait to return! Given that it was half-price-burger-day, I felt the need to give the falafel burger a shot. It was delicious! I'm not always a falafel fan, but this "burger" was awesome. The brioche bun was the perfect consistency and the portion of fries was plentiful. My friend enjoyed the cobb salad (though she requested balsamic dressing instead of buttermilk and she received buttermilk). The restaurant is quaint and has ample seating. While you order at the counter, our "server" (I believe her name was Sarah) was fantastic and made sure we had everything we needed. Overall, this is a great spot and I will be back soon...I may have to make it a weekly lunch staple!

val_args.code:
import json
import re
import pandas as pd

# Business data
business_results = [{"business_id": "businessid_49", "review_count": "8", "description": "Located at 6901 Phelps Rd in Goleta, CA, this facility offers a nurturing environment for young learners, providing a range of services in Education, Elementary Schools, Child Care & Day Care, Local Services, Preschools, and Montessori Schools."}, {"business_id": "businessid_47", "review_count": "81", "description": "Located at 9916 Clayton Rd in St. Louis, MO, this establishment offers a wide range of services, including Hair Salons, Beauty & Spas, Hair Stylists, Skin Care, Blow Dry/Out Services, and Makeup Artists."}, {"business_id": "businessid_88", "review_count": "39", "description": "Located at 11655 W Executive Dr in Boise, ID, this facility offers enthusiasts a premier destination for Gun/Rifle Ranges, Active Life."}, {"business_id": "businessid_41", "review_count": "5", "description": "Located at 1615 Pasadena Ave S, Ste 430 in Saint Petersburg, FL, this facility offers a range of services in Internal Medicine, Doctors, Health & Medical."}, {"business_id": "businessid_33", "review_count": "28", "description": "Located at 9655 E US Hwy 36, Unit H in Avon, IN, this establishment offers a range of services including Nail Salons, Hair Removal, Beauty & Spas, and Waxing."}]

# From the preview, we can see review_data contains:
# [{"business_ref": "businessref_34", "rating": "2"}, {"business_ref": "businessref_89", "rating": "5"}, ...]
# Let's create a sample from the preview to work with
review_sample = [
    {"business_ref": "businessref_34", "rating": "2"},
    {"business_ref": "businessref_89", "rating": "5"},
    {"business_ref": "businessref_82", "rating": "4"},
    {"business_ref": "businessref_66", "rating": "2"},
    {"business_ref": "businessref_95", "rating": "1"}
]

# Create dataframes
business_df = pd.DataFrame(business_results)
business_df['review_count'] = pd.to_numeric(business_df['review_count'])
business_df['business_num'] = business_df['business_id'].str.extract(r'businessid_(\d+)')

# Extract state from description
state_pattern = r'in\s+[^,]+,\s+([A-Z]{2})[\s,.]'
business_df['state'] = business_df['description'].apply(
    lambda x: re.search(state_pattern, x).group(1) if re.search(state_pattern, x) else None
)

# Find state with most reviews
state_reviews = business_df.groupby('state')['review_count'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state = state_reviews.index[0]
total_reviews_top_state = int(state_reviews.iloc[0])

# Get business numbers for the top state
top_state_businesses = business_df[business_df['state'] == top_state]['business_num'].tolist()

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'top_state': top_state,
    'total_reviews': total_reviews_top_state,
    'top_state_businesses': top_state_businesses,
    'all_states': state_reviews.to_dict()
}))

args.code:
import json
import re

# Read the review data file
review_file_path = var_functions.query_db:27

# Initialize variables
review_data = []
mo_ratings = []
business_id_map = {}

# Business data
business_results = [
    {"business_id": "businessid_49", "review_count": "8", "description": "Located at 6901 Phelps Rd in Goleta, CA, this facility offers a nurturing environment for young learners, providing a range of services in Education, Elementary Schools, Child Care & Day Care, Local Services, Preschools, and Montessori Schools."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_47", "review_count": "81", "description": "Located at 9916 Clayton Rd in St. Louis, MO, this establishment offers a wide range of services, including Hair Salons, Beauty & Spas, Hair Stylists, Skin Care, Blow Dry/Out Services, and Makeup Artists."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_88", "review_count": "39", "description": "Located at 11655 W Executive Dr in Boise, ID, this facility offers enthusiasts a premier destination for Gun/Rifle Ranges, Active Life."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_41", "review_count": "5", "description": "Located at 1615 Pasadena Ave S, Ste 430 in Saint Petersburg, FL, this facility offers a range of services in Internal Medicine, Doctors, Health & Medical."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_33", "review_count": "28", "description": "Located at 9655 E US Hwy 36, Unit H in Avon, IN, this establishment offers a range of services including Nail Salons, Hair Removal, Beauty & Spas, and Waxing."}
]

# Create mapping: business_num -> state
for biz in business_results:
    business_id = biz['business_id']
    business_num = re.search(r'businessid_(\d+)', business_id).group(1)
    
    # Extract state from description
    state_match = re.search(r'in\s+[^,]+,\s+([A-Z]{2})[\s,.]', biz['description'])
    state = state_match.group(1) if state_match else None
    
    business_id_map[business_num] = state

# Read review data from file
import os
if isinstance(review_file_path, str) and review_file_path.endswith('.json'):
    with open(review_file_path, 'r') as f:
        review_data = json.load(f)

# Filter reviews for MO businesses
for review in review_data:
    business_ref = review.get('business_ref', '')
    rating = int(review.get('rating', 0))
    
    # Extract business number from businessref
    business_num_match = re.search(r'businessref_(\d+)', business_ref)
    if business_num_match:
        business_num = business_num_match.group(1)
        
        # Check if this business is in MO
        if business_id_map.get(business_num) == 'MO':
            mo_ratings.append(rating)

# Calculate average rating for MO
avg_rating_mo = sum(mo_ratings) / len(mo_ratings) if mo_ratings else 0

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'top_state': 'MO',
    'total_businesses_in_mo': len([k for k, v in business_id_map.items() if v == 'MO']),
    'total_reviews_in_mo': len(mo_ratings),
    'average_rating_mo': round(avg_rating_mo, 2),
    'sample_mo_ratings': mo_ratings[:10]
}))

import json
import re

# Read the review data file
review_file_path = var_functions.query_db:27

# Initialize variables
review_data = []
mo_ratings = []
business_id_map = {}

# Business data
business_results = [
    {"business_id": "businessid_49", "review_count": "8", "description": "Located at 6901 Phelps Rd in Goleta, CA, this facility offers a nurturing environment for young learners, providing a range of services in Education, Elementary Schools, Child Care & Day Care, Local Services, Preschools, and Montessori Schools."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_47", "review_count": "81", "description": "Located at 9916 Clayton Rd in St. Louis, MO, this establishment offers a wide range of services, including Hair Salons, Beauty & Spas, Hair Stylists, Skin Care, Blow Dry/Out Services, and Makeup Artists."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_88", "review_count": "39", "description": "Located at 11655 W Executive Dr in Boise, ID, this facility offers enthusiasts a premier destination for Gun/Rifle Ranges, Active Life."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_41", "review_count": "5", "description": "Located at 1615 Pasadena Ave S, Ste 430 in Saint Petersburg, FL, this facility offers a range of services in Internal Medicine, Doctors, Health & Medical."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_33", "review_count": "28", "description": "Located at 9655 E US Hwy 36, Unit H in Avon, IN, this establishment offers a range of services including Nail Salons, Hair Removal, Beauty & Spas, and Waxing."}
]

# Create mapping: business_num -> state
for biz in business_results:
    business_id = biz['business_id']
    business_num = re.search(r'businessid_(\d+)', business_id).group(1)
    
    # Extract state from description
    state_match = re.search(r'in\s+[^,]+,\s+([A-Z]{2})[\s,.]', biz['description'])
    state = state_match.group(1) if state_match else None
    
    business_id_map[business_num] = state

# Read review data from file
import os
if isinstance(review_file_path, str) and review_file_path.endswith('.json'):
    with open(review_file_path, 'r') as f:
        review_data = json.load(f)

# Filter reviews for MO businesses
for review in review_data:
    business_ref = review.get('business_ref', '')
    rating = int(review.get('rating', 0))
    
    # Extract business number from businessref
    business_num_match = re.search(r'businessref_(\d+)', business_ref)
    if business_num_match:
        business_num = business_num_match.group(1)
        
        # Check if this business is in MO
        if business_id_map.get(business_num) == 'MO':
            mo_ratings.append(rating)

# Calculate average rating for MO
avg_rating_mo = sum(mo_ratings) / len(mo_ratings) if mo_ratings else 0

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'top_state': 'MO',
    'total_businesses_in_mo': len([k for k, v in business_id_map.items() if v == 'MO']),
    'total_reviews_in_mo': len(mo_ratings),
    'average_rating_mo': round(avg_rating_mo, 2),
    'sample_mo_ratings': mo_ratings[:10]
}))

val_args.code:
import json
import re

# Read the review data file from storage
review_result = locals()['var_functions.query_db:27']

# Initialize variables
review_data = []
mo_ratings = []
business_id_map = {}

# Business data
business_results = [
    {"business_id": "businessid_49", "review_count": "8", "description": "Located at 6901 Phelps Rd in Goleta, CA, this facility offers a nurturing environment for young learners, providing a range of services in Education, Elementary Schools, Child Care & Day Care, Local Services, Preschools, and Montessori Schools."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_47", "review_count": "81", "description": "Located at 9916 Clayton Rd in St. Louis, MO, this establishment offers a wide range of services, including Hair Salons, Beauty & Spas, Hair Stylists, Skin Care, Blow Dry/Out Services, and Makeup Artists."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_88", "review_count": "39", "description": "Located at 11655 W Executive Dr in Boise, ID, this facility offers enthusiasts a premier destination for Gun/Rifle Ranges, Active Life."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_41", "review_count": "5", "description": "Located at 1615 Pasadena Ave S, Ste 430 in Saint Petersburg, FL, this facility offers a range of services in Internal Medicine, Doctors, Health & Medical."},
    {"business_id": "businessid_33", "review_count": "28", "description": "Located at 9655 E US Hwy 36, Unit H in Avon, IN, this establishment offers a range of services including Nail Salons, Hair Removal, Beauty & Spas, and Waxing."}
]

# Create mapping: business_num -> state
for biz in business_results:
    business_id = biz['business_id']
    business_num = re.search(r'businessid_(\d+)', business_id).group(1)
    
    # Extract state from description
    state_match = re.search(r'in\s+[^,]+,\s+([A-Z]{2})[\s,.]', biz['description'])
    state = state_match.group(1) if state_match else None
    
    business_id_map[business_num] = state

# Load review data
if isinstance(review_result, str) and review_result.endswith('.json'):
    with open(review_result, 'r') as f:
        review_data = json.load(f)
else:
    review_data = review_result

# Filter reviews for MO businesses
for review in review_data:
    business_ref = review.get('business_ref', '')
    rating_str = review.get('rating', '0')
    rating = int(rating_str) if rating_str else 0
    
    # Extract business number from businessref
    business_num_match = re.search(r'businessref_(\d+)', business_ref)
    if business_num_match:
        business_num = business_num_match.group(1)
        
        # Check if this business is in MO
        if business_id_map.get(business_num) == 'MO':
            mo_ratings.append(rating)

# Calculate average rating for MO
avg_rating_mo = sum(mo_ratings) / len(mo_ratings) if mo_ratings else 0

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'top_state': 'MO',
    'total_businesses_in_mo': len([k for k, v in business_id_map.items() if v == 'MO']),
    'total_reviews_for_mo_businesses': len(mo_ratings),
    'average_rating_mo': round(avg_rating_mo, 2),
    'sample_mo_ratings': mo_ratings[:10]
}))

var_functions.query_db:2.text: Sure, it's cheap, but there isn't much to see. I think you'd have to have a big interest in the topic to find it exciting, and kids would be bored. I think it only lasted maybe 10-15 minutes. Our tour person was somewhat knowledgeable and seemed into it, but he didn't give us much time to read the information on each level. I had to take photos of the plaques to read later, and half of them need replacing, as they are so sun-bleached they're virtually unreadable (tour guide said they're being replaced soon and that the other half were already replaced). I really thought it needed to be higher up to give a good view. The Lewis and Clark State Historic Site just down the road was more interesting and free. If you live around here like I do and have nothing better to do, you might want to give it a go if the topic interests you, but if you're a tourist, this is not something you should waste your time on.
